title: Archive: Deep Cantonese Voice Generation
description: Archive reason: Cantonese ASR/TTS corpora and benchmarks now exist, and speech generation is outside the current embodied robotics dashboard scope.
summary: Deep Cantonese voice generation is archived as a deferred non-core language/audio item. It should not stay in Survey unless a robot/audio interaction project needs Cantonese speech data.

details.text: WenetSpeech-Yue provides a large-scale Cantonese corpus and ASR/TTS evaluation resources, covering the data/benchmark foundation this topic would otherwise need.

details: Moved-out live work: none in the current embodied-AI dashboard. It can be revisited under a voice-agent or robot-HRI track.
Archive decision: defer rather than keep as Survey clutter.
risks_decisions: Reason type: out of current portfolio scope and externally supplied corpus/benchmark foundation.
Reopen condition: a concrete Cantonese robot-HRI demo or reading/speech assistant becomes part of the dashboard.

Notion migration 2026-05-31: the open checkbox from idea bak is intentionally archived because it is speech-generation work outside the embodied robotics dashboard loop; reopen only if tied to a concrete robot interaction dataset or lab product need.
